productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Ct AsAll Star 08 Hi Green Casual Shoes
description: The Chuck Taylor All Star is a symbol of originality and self-expression the world over. The pioneers that put the lsquo;squeakrsquo; in Basketball have been an off-the-court favorite of rock stars and rebels for the past 60 years. Dedicated to basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse is also called Chucks, and comes in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse was initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into a hot casual footwear favourite. Upper denim upper for easy maintenance and durability Upper with All Star patch detailing beside the ankle and graphiti on the other side of the ankle Contrast lacing for maximum style High ankle for extra support to the upper ankle and for style Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Eyelets on the lateral side for ventilation Midsole Comfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioning Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugsand grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water Warranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
